title: Dinh Nhu Tan | Software Engineer | Fullstack Developer
description: Hello, I'm Tan! I graduated from Ho Chi Minh University of Technology  in 2023 with a bachelor's degree in Computer Science - Software Engineering. I'm currently living and working in Ho Chi Minh city as a Software Engineer.I'm passionate about programming and I love to learn new things.
author: Dinh Nhu Tan
